name: This Day in History
description: Throwback content celebrating a historic moment that occurred on this date in Dinamo Zagreb's history. Connects past and present.

event_title.example: Dinamo wins the Inter-Cities Fairs Cup Final

event_description.example: Dinamo Zagreb defeated Leeds United 2-0 in the first leg of the Fairs Cup Final at Maksimir, with goals from Zambata and Cercek.

guidelines: Slide 1: Archival photo with a subtle vintage grain filter and the date badge. Slide 2: Detailed description with context. Slide 3: Related current-day connection if applicable. Use a sepia/desaturated treatment on historic photos. The date badge should be prominent with 'On This Day' branding. Great for mornings to set daily engagement.
